---
name: Show & Tell
about: Share what you built or discovered with SEA
title: "[Show & Tell] "
labels: show-and-tell
assignees: ''
---

**What problem did you investigate?**
One sentence on the research question.

**How many iterations did SEA run?**
Iterations, findings count, questions resolved.

**What surprised you?**
The most unexpected finding or agent behavior.

**What would you improve?**
Anything that didn't work well or could be better.
